articles.title: UPSSSC ASO Mains shortlisting result 2026 released for 1,565 vacancies; check direct link here
articles.summary: The Uttar Pradesh Subordinate Services Selection Commission (UPSSSC) has announced the ASO Mains Exam Shortlisting Result 2026 for the recruitment of Assistant Statistical Officer and Assistant Research Officer posts. The recruitment drive covers 1,565 vacancies after the commission increased the original count from 929.

articles.title: RSSB Forester Recruitment Exam 2026 Today: Check Important Exam Day Guidelines and Admit Card Link
articles.summary: The Rajasthan Staff Selection Board (RSSB) is conducting the Forester (Vanpal) Direct Recruitment Exam 2026 today, June 28, in a single shift from 11 AM to 1 PM. Candidates must carry their admit card, valid photo ID, and passport-sized photograph while following the prescribed dress code and prohibited items list.

articles.title: Agniveer Result 2026: Final merit list date and time expected soon; here is what we know so far
articles.summary: The Indian Army is expected to release the Agniveer 2026 final merit list in the first week of July for candidates who appeared in the Phase 2 Common Entrance Examination held from June 1 to 12. The ARO-wise selection lists will be available on the official portal.

articles.title: NIFT UG 2026 round 1 seat allotment result declared; candidates can download allotment letters here
articles.summary: NIFT UG 2026: The National Testing Agency has released the NIFT UG 2026 round 1 seat allotment result on the official counselling portal. Candidates can check their allotment status using their roll number and password, download the provisional allotment letter, submit their willingness and pay the admission fee.
